title: [ExportVerilog] Binds of Temporaries are named strangely

features.name: sv_wire with sv_bind reference to instance signal
features.description: Code should include an sv.wire declaration used in conjunction with an sv.bind operation that references an hw.instance output signal

features.name: sv_wire with multiple sv_read_inout operations
features.description: Code should include an sv.wire that is read multiple times using sv.read_inout operations

features.name: sv_bind with output_file attribute
features.description: Code should include an sv.bind operation with output_file attribute that specifies directory, exclude_from_filelist, and name parameters
features.snippet: sv.bind @__Bar__ {output_file = {directory = "", exclude_from_filelist = true, exclude_replicated_ops = true, name = "bindings.sv"}}
